## Knowledge Base Results for "trigger holdoff"

### SCPI Commands
- **Time** (public/commands/mso_2_4_5_6_7.json)
  Command: TRIGger:A:HOLDoff:TIMe Description: This command sets or queries the A trigger holdoff time. This command is equivalent to selecting Mode & H
- **By** (public/commands/mso_2_4_5_6_7.json)
